---
title: "Static Assets"
page-layout: full
---

# General Contents

::: {.list-table}

- - Asset type
  - Description
  - Reference

- - `audio`
  - all bird sounds and metadata for each species
  - `app/www/audio/`

- - `images`
  - all images served with the app including birds and layout-related
  - `app/www/img/`

- - `vignettes`
  - HTML vignettes corresponding to the BAMexploreR package
  - `app/www/vignettes/`

- - `styles.css`
  - CSS styling that is applied to the entire app
  - `app/www/styles.css`

:::
